evidence_quote: They waited before the round tower, the red mountains of Dorne at their backs, their white cloaks blowing in the wind.
asserted_relation: The combat took place at the tower of joy in the Red Mountains of Dorne

evidence_quote: They had been seven against three, yet only two had lived to ride away; Eddard Stark himself and the little crannogman, Howland Reed.
asserted_relation: Eddard Stark fought at the combat at the tower of joy and was one of only two survivors

evidence_quote: They had been seven against three, yet only two had lived to ride away; Eddard Stark himself and the little crannogman, Howland Reed.
asserted_relation: Howland Reed fought at the combat at the tower of joy and was one of only two survivors

evidence_quote: Martyn Cassel had perished with the rest. Ned had pulled the tower down afterward, and used its bloody stones to build eight cairns upon the ridge.
asserted_relation: Martyn Cassel fought and died at the combat at the tower of joy

evidence_quote: In the dream his friends rode with him, as they had in life. Proud Martyn Cassel, Jory's father; faithful Theo Wull; Ethan Glover, who had been Brandon's squire; Ser Mark Ryswell, soft of speech and gentle of heart; the crannogman, Howland Reed; Lord Dustin on his great red stallion.
asserted_relation: Theo Wull rode with Ned to the tower of joy (dream narration = second-hand recall)

evidence_quote: Ser Arthur Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, had a sad smile on his lips. The hilt of the greatsword Dawn poked up over his right shoulder.
asserted_relation: Ser Arthur Dayne was one of the three Kingsguard who fought at the tower of joy

evidence_quote: Ser Oswell Whent was on one knee, sharpening his blade with a whetstone. Across his white-enameled helm, the black bat of his House spread its wings.
asserted_relation: Ser Oswell Whent was one of the three Kingsguard who fought at the tower of joy

evidence_quote: Between them stood fierce old Ser Gerold Hightower, the White Bull, Lord Commander of the Kingsguard.
asserted_relation: Ser Gerold Hightower was one of the three Kingsguard who fought at the tower of joy
